TC_UI_006: Font sizes adjust on mobile
TC_VUL_001: Verify script tags in email field do not execute.
TC_VUL_002: Verify script tags in password field do not execute.
TC_VUL_003: Verify script tags in name field on signup do not execute.
TC_VUL_004: Verify img onerror XSS payload in email is not executed.
TC_VUL_005: Verify SVG onload XSS payload in inputs is not executed.
TC_VUL_006: Verify javascript: protocol in email does not execute.
TC_VUL_007: Verify event handler injection in email does not execute.
TC_VUL_008: Verify encoded XSS payload does not execute.
TC_VUL_009: Verify XSS via URL hash fragment does not execute.
TC_VUL_010: Verify no innerHTML-based DOM XSS vulnerabilities.
TC_VUL_011: Verify XSS in search bar does not execute.
TC_VUL_012: Verify localStorage data with XSS payloads doesn't execute.
TC_VUL_013: Verify SQL injection in email field is handled safely.
TC_VUL_014: Verify SQL injection in password field is handled safely.
TC_VUL_015: Verify NoSQL injection payload is handled safely.
TC_VUL_016: Verify LDAP injection in email is handled safely.
TC_VUL_017: Verify command injection in inputs is handled safely.
TC_VUL_018: Verify boolean-based injection does not bypass auth.
TC_VUL_019: Verify password field masks input (type=password).
TC_VUL_020: Verify password is not exposed in URL after form submit.
TC_VUL_021: Verify entered credentials don't appear in page source.
TC_VUL_022: Verify form submission does not cause traditional page redirect.
TC_VUL_023: Verify passwords are not stored in localStorage.
TC_VUL_024: Verify session tokens are not exposed in URL.
TC_VUL_025: Verify logout properly clears authentication state.
TC_VUL_026: Verify back button after logout doesn't show protected content.
TC_VUL_027: Verify password input has appropriate autocomplete handling.
TC_VUL_028: Verify signup password field is masked.
TC_VUL_029: Verify email field validates email format.
TC_VUL_030: Verify app handles extremely long email input without crashing.
TC_VUL_031: Verify app handles extremely long password without crashing.
TC_VUL_032: Verify special characters in name field are handled.
TC_VUL_033: Verify Unicode and emoji characters in fields are handled.
TC_VUL_034: Verify null byte injection is handled safely.
TC_VUL_035: Verify CRLF injection in inputs is handled safely.
TC_VUL_036: Verify file input only accepts PDF files.
TC_VUL_037: Verify no sensitive data is logged to console.
TC_VUL_038: Verify Firebase API key is not directly visible in HTML body.
TC_VUL_039: Verify source maps are not served in production build.
TC_VUL_040: Verify no inline event handlers in the HTML document.
TC_VUL_041: Verify localStorage data maintains integrity.
TC_VUL_042: Verify no hardcoded user credentials in page source.
TC_VUL_043: Verify React is not in development mode in production.
TC_VUL_044: Verify the application structure supports HTTPS.
TC_VUL_045: Verify form submissions are handled as SPA (no traditional POST).
TC_VUL_046: Verify app content is accessible (iframe protection is server-side).
TC_VUL_047: Verify no open redirect vulnerabilities via URL parameters.
TC_VUL_048: Verify form does not have external action URL.
TC_VUL_049: Verify file input restricts to PDF MIME type.
TC_VUL_050: Verify file input is hidden from direct user interaction.
